title: HELLDIVERS 2

notes: Arrowhead added new "driver validation" checks in this patch that appear to misfire entirely on Linux, killing the process silently right after the anti-cheat splash with no useful output. Results are the same across CachyOS, Fedora, Bazzite, Debian, and Ubuntu with identical results. Some Windows users are also hitting crash code 0x44415441, suggesting the validation logic itself is the problem rather than anything Proton-specific.
